name: California Garlic Soup Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute garlic in butter for 10 minutes, stirring often.
2. Do not brown the mixture.
3. Add broth, water, and champagne to the sauteed garlic and butter. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Toast bread slices.
5. Ladle the soup into bowls.
6. Float the toasted bread on top of the soup.
7. Sprinkle Gruyere cheese over the bread.
8. Bake at 475 degrees, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with cayenne pepper and minced chives.
